headline: Man's 'I'm Not Ready For A Relationship' Was Code For 'I'm Not Ready To Stop Seeing 5 Other People'
summary: The 'roster' has grown. The 'not ready' guy is now 'not ready' to check his DMs.
fullBody: Jake Roster told his situationship he 'wasn't ready for a relationship.' He was, however, ready to date 5 other people. 'It's different,' Jake explained. 'I'm not ready for labels.' His situationship found the others through a 'are we dating the same guy' Facebook group. The group now has 500 members. Jake has deleted all apps. He is now 'focusing on himself.' Alone. In hiding.
